code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Generate a fluent single‑sentence description from a list of triples."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping of predicate to natural‑language phrase
    phrase_map = {
        "almaMater": "graduated from",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "birthName": "born as",
        "birthPlace": "in",
        "dateOfRetirement": "retired in",
        "occupation": "worked as a",
        "status": "status is",
        "timeInSpace": "spent",
        "mission": "mission",
        "selectedByNasa": "selected by NASA in",
        "deathDate": "died on",
        "nationality": "of",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": "served as chief of the astronaut office in",
        "title": "held the title",
        "ribbonAward": "received the ribbon",
        "operator": "operated by",
        "backupPilot": "backup pilot",
        "commander": "commander",
        "crewMembers": "crew member",
        "representative": "represented by",
        "alternativeName": "also known as",
        "awards": "awards",
        "fossil": "fossil",
        "senators": "senators",
        "part": "part of",
        "partsType": "parts type",
        "higher": "higher than",
        "isPartOf": "part of",
        "bird": "bird",
        "leader": "leader",
        "affiliation": "affiliated with",
        "competeIn": "competes in",
        "president": "president",
        "award": "received the award",
        "deathPlace": "died in",
        "gemstone": "gemstone",
        "mascot": "mascot",
        "cosparId": "COSPAR ID",
        "utcOffset": "UTC offset",
    }

    # Group triples by subject
    subject_triples: dict[str, list[Triple]] = {}
    for t in triples:
        subject_triples.setdefault(t.subject, []).append(t)

    # Find main subject (most triples or first one)
    main_subject = max(subject_triples.keys(), key=lambda s: len(subject_triples[s])) if subject_triples else ""
    main_triples = subject_triples.get(main_subject, [])

    # Build sentence parts in logical order
    parts = []

    # Birth information first
    birth_info = []
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "birthName":
            birth_info.append(f"born as {t.object}")
        elif t.predicate == "birthDate":
            birth_info.append(f"born on {t.object}")
        elif t.predicate == "birthPlace":
            birth_info.append(f"in {t.object}")

    if birth_info:
        parts.append(main_subject + " was " + ", ".join(birth_info))

    # Nationality
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "nationality":
            parts.append(f"of {t.object}")

    # Occupation and status
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "occupation":
            parts.append(f"who worked as a {t.object}")
        elif t.predicate == "status":
            parts.append(f"with status {t.object}")

    # NASA selection
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "selectedByNasa":
            parts.append(f"selected by NASA in {t.object}")

    # Mission information
    mission_info = []
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "mission":
            mission_info.append(t.object)
    if mission_info:
        missions_text = ", ".join(mission_info[:-1]) + (" and " + mission_info[-1] if len(mission_info) > 1 else mission_info[0])
        parts.append(f"who participated in mission {missions_text}")

    # Time in space
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "timeInSpace":
            parts.append(f"and spent {t.object} minutes in space")

    # Retirement
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "dateOfRetirement":
            parts.append(f"retired in {t.object}")

    # Death information
    death_info = []
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "deathDate":
            death_info.append(f"died on {t.object}")
        elif t.predicate == "deathPlace":
            death_info.append(f"in {t.object}")
    if death_info:
        parts.append(" ".join(death_info))

    # Assemble final sentence
    sentence = ", ".join(parts) if parts else main_subject
    sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
    if not sentence.endswith("."):
        sentence += "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
